# Code of Conduct

## Professional Standards
We expect all contributors to maintain a high level of technical professionalism. 

Expected behavior includes:
* Focusing strictly on the technical quality and architecture of the project.
* Providing constructive, code-focused feedback.
* Maintaining professional communication in all Issues, Pull Requests, and Discussions.

Unacceptable behavior includes:
* Personal attacks, insults, or harassment.
* Spam, trolling, or disruption of the development process.
* Any conduct considered inappropriate in a professional engineering environment.

## Enforcement
The project administrators reserve the right to moderate comments, reject code, or block users at their sole discretion, without prior warning or explanation. The interpretation of these standards and the final decision on any punitive actions belong exclusively to the repository owners.
